subject: chore(assets): remove orphan splash.png
body:
`assets/images/splash.png` (47 kB) had zero references across code,
config, or the icon generator. Distinct from `assets/images/splash-icon.png`
(118 kB, generated by scripts/generate-icons.mjs and referenced by
app.json's `splash.image`). Predates the current Sharp-based generator.

app.json's `assetBundlePatterns: ["**/*"]` means every file under assets/
ships in the Expo binary, so the orphan was adding 47 kB of dead weight
to every build.

Found by the `pattern-audit` trigger against glow-props APP_ICONS.md.

Tags: cleanup, assets, build
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: fleet-alignment
Semver: patch
